headline: Verizon Debt Moves Reshape Capital Structure And Investor Risk Profile
summary: Verizon Communications (NYSE:VZ) has launched major debt exchange and cash tender offers covering a wide range of outstanding bonds, including securities from recent acquisitions. The company is seeking to streamline its capital structure, retire or swap existing debt, and remove certain restrictive bond covenants. Verizon has also completed new US fixed to floating rate hybrid bond issuances following the close of the Frontier Communications deal. As one of the largest US telecom...
